commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 修复移动端更改封面重复弹出的问题

删除帖子卡片循环内的内联封面选择器（与底部弹窗版重复导致叠加），
只保留底部弹窗版，并补充「当前封面」文字标识

commit.message:
Implement Extended Link Opaque LSA parser and database detail display

- Parse Extended Link TLV (RFC 7684 §3) with Adj-SID (RFC 8665 §5)
  and LAN Adj-SID (RFC 8665 §6) Sub-TLVs
- Add show database detail output for Extended Link LSAs
- Clean up remaining debug println statements in ifsm.rs and inst.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add create task dialog, auto-save, multi-file drop, and comments/data fixes

- Add CreateTaskDialog: when filters are active, Enter opens a dialog instead
  of inserting an inline block, supporting #hashtag and @mention parsing
- Add debounced auto-save (3s default) for inline note title edits
- Support multi-file drag & drop in BlockNoteEditor with parallel uploads,
  and inject delete buttons on file blocks
- Simplify comments UI: remove reply/resolve threading, flatten to a linear
  comment list with compact layout and toast on save
- Make comments fully optimistic: instant UI updates with pending-mutation
  guard to prevent realtime subscription from overwriting local state
- Fix foreign key violations: await note insert in Supabase before emitting
  label/assignee events in createNote and createNoteAfter
- Add optimistic assignee cache updates via event subscription
- Change default note sort from sort_order to created_at descending
- Fix GCal calendar fetch deduplication with one-shot ref
- Add is_default field to Contact type, fix Supabase type casts
- Remove note_comments updated_at DB trigger (managed in app code)
- Add i18n keys for create task dialog and comment saved toast (en/es/pt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct api test mocks for jsdom environment and flexible header matching

Use jsdom's native window instead of stubbing globalThis, and match headers
with objectContaining to avoid brittleness from additional default headers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement OSPF SR TLV parsing and database detail display

- Move SidLabelTlv to packet-utils crate for sharing between isis-packet and ospf-packet
- Add OSPF-style SID/Label Sub-TLV parser (2+2 byte header vs IS-IS 1+1)
- Parse RouterInfo TLVs: SID/Label Range, Local Block, Router Capability, Algorithm
- Implement Extended Prefix Opaque LSA parser (RFC 7684) with Prefix SID Sub-TLV (RFC 8665)
- Add "show ip ospf database detail" output for Opaque Area LSAs with SR details
- Clean up debug println statements in nfsm.rs

commit.message:
kind-pasteur-S34: deletion-contraction H(T)=H(T\e)+H(T/e) VERIFIED + Lee-Yang zeros + GLMY homology

Key result: H(T) = H(T\e) + H(T/e) holds 100% at n=4,5 — commutative
specialization of Mitrovic's noncommuting deletion-contraction identity.
Added Lee-Yang zeros connection from opus-S44 and GLMY path homology.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: unify versioning around single VERSION file (#28)

* fix: eliminate command injection in MCP server and runtime adapters

Security fixes:
- Replace execSync string interpolation with execFileSync + array args
  in runtime/mcp/server.js (prevents shell metacharacter injection)
- Add input validation: validateName() for MCP server names,
  validateNumber() for numeric parameters like threshold
- Restrict CORS to localhost origins instead of permissive cors()
- Add 10kb request body size limit on Express
- Replace eval-based resolve_env() in mcp-adapter.sh with safe
  indirect variable expansion using ${!varname}

All MCP tool handlers and dashboard API endpoints now pass arguments
as arrays rather than interpolated strings.

https://claude.ai/code/session_013s79yzdi5iesvTuCLhiekk

* test: add schema validation and security smoke tests

- schema-contract.test.mjs: validates all 22 skills against schema,
  verifies unknown fields in tests/docs/monitoring are rejected
  (additionalProperties: false), confirms all known fields accepted
- mcp-security.test.mjs: tests validateName rejects shell metacharacters
  (; | & $() `` ../), validates validateNumber sanitizes input
- Extract validators to runtime/mcp/validators.mjs so tests can import
  without pulling MCP server dependencies
- Add npm test step to CI build workflow

71 tests, 0 failures.

https://claude.ai/code/session_013s79yzdi5iesvTuCLhiekk

* feat: unify versioning around single VERSION file

Replace timestamp-based build versions with a canonical VERSION file
as the single source of truth. The compiler now reads the release
version from VERSION instead of inventing 1.0.0-build.<timestamp>.

Key changes:
- Add VERSION file (0.5.4) as the only manually-edited version source
- Add versioning.mjs utility (read, validate, provenance, parity)
- Add sync-release-version.mjs to mirror VERSION into package.json
  and plugin.json
- Add check-version-parity.mjs to assert all files match VERSION
- Refactor compiler and all emitters to use releaseVersion + optional
  provenance (only in --release mode or AI_CONFIG_RELEASE=1)
- Local builds are now deterministic (no timestamps injected)
- Add comprehensive version tests (parity, local/release modes,
  malformed VERSION rejection, sync correctness)
- Update CI to check version parity and trigger on VERSION changes
- Update CLAUDE.md and README.md to reflect new versioning model

https://claude.ai/code/session_013s79yzdi5iesvTuCLhiekk

commit.message:
Classify ForkInFinalErrors → §9.2.3 [skip ci]

§9.2.3 "Final procedures" states that only statements legal inside a function are permitted in a final block. fork/join is a time-consuming construct prohibited in functions, so it is prohibited in final blocks by this clause.

commit.message:
Fix attestation PUT: handle empty updates after column stripping

When the PUT payload only contains structured fields that don't exist
in the DB, the retry loop strips them all, resulting in an empty
update({}) which causes PGRST116. Now returns existing row as no-op.

commit.message:
Align source code with upgraded agent specs (all 5 phases)

Phase 1 - Core Pipeline: Market regime returns dict with regime_confidence,
renamed "neutral" → "transitional", added VIX/cross-asset regime detection,
signal conflict detection, regime-adjusted thresholds, catalyst passthrough.

Phase 2 - Technical/Position: Added ADX (ta lib), MACD histogram trend,
volume confirmation, rebalanced scoring weights. Position reviewer gains
time decay, event risk, exit_urgency, exit_score_breakdown.

Phase 3 - Risk/Screener: Sector concentration limits, catalyst-aware sizing,
regime conflict sizing, volatility-adjusted sizing. Screener adds dollar
volume filter, trading days completeness, screening_stats.

Phase 4 - Sentiment/Executor: Catalyst identification (earnings/FDA/FOMC),
signal vs noise classification, earnings date. Executor adds timing
restrictions (ET), liquidity pre-check, slippage estimation.

Phase 5 - Reporting/Reflection/Fundamentals: Risk dashboard, strategy health,
earnings alerts. Performance attribution (6 dims), strategy decay detection.
Fundamentals adds ROE, operating margin, red_flags[], highlights[].

fix: deduplicate osha_ita rows by dedup_key before batch upsert

The OSHA dataset contains duplicate establishment entries (same
name+address+city+state+year) that caused "ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE
command cannot affect row a second time" errors when two duplicates
landed in the same 500-row upsert batch. Now deduplicates the full
mapped array by dedup_key before batching.

fix: refit deploys dist without restarting bots, rollback on join failure

Refit changes:
- No longer calls bootstrapBot for active bots (which does full npm ci +
  build + restart). Instead just copies dist/ files to running instances.
- Bots stay in their current status. Use !restart to explicitly restart.

Join failure rollback:
- If join fails after setting status to onduty, roll back to lounge,
  stop the bot, and persist. Prevents stale onduty status in fleet.json.
- Post-failure thread/reply sends wrapped in try/catch (connection dead).

commit.message:
fix: add --allow-sys=homedir to fix home page 500 on Cloud Run (#1177)

* chore: update Dockerfile for Deno v2

- Upgrade base image from denoland/deno:1.40.2 to 2.7.2
- Switch CMD from `deno run main.ts` to `deno serve _fresh/server.js` (Fresh 2.x built output)
- Remove --allow-run (no longer needed in Fresh 2.x)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add --allow-sys=homedir to fix home page 500 on Cloud Run

Octokit (npm) internally calls os.homedir() which requires --allow-sys=homedir
in Deno v2. Without this permission, the Octokit constructor throws a
synchronous PermissionDenied error, causing the home page handler to 500.

Also add explicit return type annotation to getRepositories().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: apply deno fmt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Classify ForkInAlwaysFFErrors → §9.2.2.4 [skip ci]

§9.2.2.4 defines the always_ff procedure and states it "imposes the restriction that it contains one and only one event control and no blocking timing controls." fork...join is a blocking construct (§9.3.2: "the parent process blocks until all the processes spawned by this fork terminate"), so it violates the always_ff restriction in §9.2.2.4.
